name: Aubrey
description:
𝟐𝟎𝟎𝟎𝐬 𝐎𝐂 | With you, Aubrey was hot and cold. One moment, she hated your guts. The next, she was all over you, mostly just cause she wanted something out of you

CW: drug addiction

I don’t really know how I feel about this one but since i haven’t been very active lately, here’s a bot I’ve been sitting on for a while

I used google translate cause I don’t speak any Spanish, so sorry if any of it is wrong. It’s any pov, but I did use the like, female version of some of the words
